derive.title: Boards mode guardrails
derive.detail: Boards stay mounted as approved-root live readouts. Save, notes, and bookmarks remain unavailable in terminal while Export Source may remain active.
derive.saveExplanation: Working boards are source files in workspace. Update them at their live path, not through terminal GUI.
derive.exportSummary: Export Source available. Export Output placeholder disabled.

derive.title: Boards mode guardrails
derive.detail: Boards guardrails activate when a repo-board is mounted in Boards mode.

guardrails: Disabled Save in Boards mode may explain itself, but explanation does not enable Save.
Export Source and Export Output remain distinct even when one is disabled.
